description: No raw `<button>` in `apps/**/*.tsx`. Use DS `Button` with explicit variant + size
No hex / rgb() / hsl() literals in `apps/**`. Use CSS custom properties (`var(--token)`)
No inline `boxShadow:` / `box-shadow:`. Use DS shadow tokens or `shadow-{sm,md,lg}` utilities
No raw `<table>` in `apps/**/*.tsx`. Use `Table` (admin) or `DataTable` (student)
No `toast()` / Sonner in admin apps. Use `LocalBanner` / `SystemBanner`. (Student apps: allowed per studentUX rules.)
No edits to `exxat-ds/` or `studentUX/` (read-only submodules)
Component imports must match the active DS profile. Admin: `@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src`. Student: `@exxat/student/components/...`
Tailwind color utilities outside the semantic allowlist (`bg-background`, `text-foreground`, `border-border`, `bg-muted`, `text-muted-foreground`, `bg-card`, `bg-popover`, etc.) are banned
DS components may not have visual treatments (shadow, border, hover bg, padding, gradient) beyond what the DS source defines, unless documented as an exception

Before importing any DS component, the import must resolve in `docs/foundations/ds-snapshot.json` for the active profile (203 admin exports + 54 student primitives + 46 shared as of v0.2.0). Hallucinated components are blocked

No inline typography literals (`fontSize`, `fontWeight`, `fontFamily` as raw values in `style={{}}`). Use Tailwind classes (`text-xs`, `font-semibold`) or token references (`var(--text-xs)`, `var(--font-sans)`)
Icon-only `<Button>` requires `aria-label`
Focus rings may not be removed. `outline-none` requires `focus-visible:ring-*`
Text contrast ≥ 4.5:1 (normal) / ≥ 3:1 (large). Tokens use `--foreground`/`--muted-foreground` against background
Decorative Font Awesome icons require `aria-hidden="true"`
Min touch target 44px on mobile / student apps. Use `--control-height-touch`
`DialogTitle` / `SheetTitle` required. Visually-hidden titles use `className="sr-only"`
Sidebar shell: `<SidebarProvider className="h-svh"> + <Sidebar variant="inset">` required in admin layout.tsx
Color is never the only encoding. Pair color with shape, label, or icon (charts, status, alerts)

Nav substructure must follow DS templates. Sidebar uses `Sidebar > SidebarContent > SidebarGroup > SidebarMenu > SidebarMenuItem > SidebarMenuButton`. Breadcrumb uses `Breadcrumb > BreadcrumbList > BreadcrumbItem > BreadcrumbLink`. Tabs uses `Tabs > TabsList > TabsTrigger` + `TabsContent`. Skipping levels or substituting custom elements breaks keyboard nav and screen-reader semantics
Progress bars are last resort. More than one `<Progress>` or `width: ${n}%` per `.tsx` requires justification comment OR pattern reference from `docs/patterns/viz/`
Viz first, text annotates. Outliers/comparisons drawn on the viz; do not enumerate in prose
Chart color must use `--chart-1` … `--chart-5`. Conditional thresholds use `--conditional-rule-{green,yellow,blue,red,purple,orange}`. No raw chart colors
No red (`--destructive`, hue ~25) in score/rating/performance viz. Use amber/orange (`--chart-4`, `--chart-5`) for "below threshold"
Viz selection rubric (in `docs/patterns/viz/RUBRIC.md`) must be consulted for every analytics card
Use the glossary in `apps/<product>/docs/content.md`. New terms added via intake before use
Empty states propose action; never "No data"
Error messages explain what happened, why, and what to do
Tone matches active DS profile: admin = clinical-formal; student = supportive-empowering
Granola transcripts pulled when user references a meeting → saved to `apps/<product>/docs/research/meetings/`
Decisions detected ("decided", "going with", "the answer is") → ADR at `docs/decisions/<NNN>-<title>.md`
New terminology proposed → glossary addition with confirmation before persisting
Designer overrides ("ignore the rule", "exception here") → captured as ADR + pattern exception + DESIGN.md amendment if generalizable
Core Web Vitals budgets per app type: LCP ≤ 2.5s (1.5s for assessment-taker), INP ≤ 200ms (100ms for assessment-taker), CLS ≤ 0.1 (0.05 for assessment-taker)
Initial bundle size budgets: admin ≤ 250KB, student ≤ 200KB, assessment-taker ≤ 150KB. Routes lazy-load beyond initial
Use `next/image` for layout-impacting images (admin/student). Raw `` only for decorative/tiny imagery
Font loading via documented Typekit + Font Awesome references only; no new font sources without ADR
Server components by default; `'use client'` opt-in only when interactivity, browser APIs, or React hooks needed
Hot-path sub-bundles: assessment-taker exam delivery <100KB to first paint, mobile eval form <60KB, module launcher <500ms tile-status fetch
All user-facing strings live in message catalogs (`apps/<product>/<app-type>/messages/<locale>.json`); no hardcoded strings in components
Locale resolution at school-configuration level; no per-user override Phase 1

CSS uses logical properties (`padding-inline-start`, `margin-inline-end`, `text-align: start`) instead of physical (`left`/`right`); Tailwind logical classes (`ps-*`, `pe-*`, `me-*`, `start-*`, `end-*`) are first-class
New locale activation requires ADR documenting locale, glossary owner, QA path
